overview.description: The iShares Mortgage-Backed Securities Active ETF (MBBA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in investment grade, mortgage-backed US debt securities of various maturities. MBBA was launched on Jan 23, 2026 and is issued by BlackRock.
